f001_w004_material_replenishment.fasten_part_with_driver: the worker presses a suspended electric driver against a metal part and tightens the fastener
f001_w004_material_replenishment.pour_parts_from_bag: the worker turns a transparent bag upside down and shakes the black metal parts out into a container on the worktable
f001_w004_material_replenishment.roll_empty_bag: the worker rolls the empty transparent bag with both hands into a small bundle

f001_w011_metal_stamping.feed_metal_strip_into_press: the worker supports a long narrow metal strip with both hands and feeds it into the working position of the press machine
f001_w011_metal_stamping.walk_to_next_press: the worker leaves the first press machine and walks along the aisle to the adjacent press machine
f001_w011_metal_stamping.pick_up_metal_sheets: the worker grasps and lifts several thin rectangular metal sheets from the material area of the press machine
f001_w011_metal_stamping.align_metal_sheet_stack: the worker aligns the edges of the lifted stack of thin metal sheets with both hands

f002_w002_garment_bagging.pick_garment_from_stack: the worker grasps and lifts the top folded garment from a stack
f002_w002_garment_bagging.insert_garment_into_bag: the worker slides a folded garment through the opening of a transparent packaging bag
f002_w002_garment_bagging.seal_bag_flap: the worker folds over the adhesive flap of the transparent packaging bag and presses it down with the fingers to seal it
f002_w002_garment_bagging.place_package_to_right: the worker lifts the sealed garment package, moves it to the right side of the worktable, and sets it down

f002_w005_garment_ironing.place_folding_board: the worker places a white rectangular folding board at the center of a light purple shirt and aligns it with both hands
f002_w005_garment_ironing.fold_shirt_around_board: the worker folds the left and right sides of a light purple shirt inward around a white folding board
f002_w005_garment_ironing.turn_and_neaten_folded_shirt: the worker lifts the folded light purple shirt, turns it face up, and straightens its shape with both hands
f002_w005_garment_ironing.stack_folded_shirt: the worker places the completed folded light purple shirt onto the finished stack at the upper side of the worktable

f003_w005_metal_casting.carry_casting_bundle: the worker carries a connected bundle of silver cast metal parts in one hand from the worktable to a wooden crate
f003_w005_metal_casting.put_casting_into_crate: the worker places the carried silver cast metal parts into the wooden crate in front
f003_w005_metal_casting.pick_up_hammer: the worker picks up a metal hammer with a wooden handle from the worktable using the right hand
f003_w005_metal_casting.hammer_casting: the worker repeatedly strikes the silver cast metal parts on the worktable with a wooden-handled metal hammer

f003_w007_wax_pattern.event_001: the worker cleans a yellow component using a white rod-shaped tool
f003_w007_wax_pattern.event_002: the worker marks a yellow object with white chalk
f003_w007_wax_pattern.event_003: the worker places a yellow component into a tray

f003_w009_injection_molding.event_001: the worker removes a yellow plastic component from a metal mold
f003_w009_injection_molding.event_002: the worker holds a metal rod

f004_w005_heat_press.raise_heat_press_handle: the worker lifts the orange-gripped handle of the heat press and opens the upper platen
f004_w005_heat_press.remove_white_fabric_from_heat_press: the worker pulls a white fabric item out from under the open heat press, moves it to the right worktable, and spreads it out
f004_w005_heat_press.separate_white_fabric_from_stack: the worker pinches the edge of one white fabric item from the stack on the left, separates it, and lifts it
f004_w005_heat_press.align_and_fold_white_fabric_on_table: the worker places the white fabric item on the center worktable, folds it over with both hands, and aligns its edges

f004_w005_overlock_seaming.guide_pink_fabric_under_presser_foot: the worker feeds the edge of pink fabric under the sewing-machine presser foot while guiding it with both hands
f004_w005_overlock_seaming.remove_pink_fabric_from_sewing_machine: the worker pulls pink fabric away from the sewing-machine needle area and moves it aside
f004_w005_overlock_seaming.take_next_pink_fabric_from_pile: the worker reaches to the fabric pile on the left and takes out the next piece of pink fabric
f004_w005_overlock_seaming.spread_and_align_pink_fabric_edges: the worker spreads the pink fabric with both hands and follows its edge to align the overlapping fabric edges
f004_w005_overlock_seaming.position_pink_fabric_at_presser_foot: the worker brings the aligned pink fabric edge to the sewing-machine needle area and positions it at the presser foot

f005_w001_semi_automatic.place_ring_part_on_machine_spindle: the worker places a ring-shaped part with visible red-orange windings onto the central vertical machine spindle and winds the white line around it
f005_w001_semi_automatic.arrange_white_cord_by_hand: the worker uses the fingers of both hands to guide and arrange the white cord between the windings of the ring-shaped part on the spindle
f005_w001_semi_automatic.press_illuminated_control_switch: the worker holds the ring-shaped part with the left hand while pressing the illuminated switch on the right control panel with the right hand
f005_w001_semi_automatic.reach_and_return_with_black_tweezers: the worker reaches the right arm above the control panel and returns to the ring-shaped part holding black tweezers
f005_w001_semi_automatic.position_black_tweezers_at_white_cord: the worker brings the tip of black tweezers toward the white cord on the ring-shaped part and aligns the tip with the cord
f005_w001_semi_automatic.tuck_white_cord_with_black_tweezers: the worker uses black tweezers and the fingers to push and arrange the white cord between the windings of the ring-shaped part
f005_w001_semi_automatic.reach_toward_control_panel_top: the worker holds the ring-shaped part with the left hand while reaching the right hand toward the top of the control panel

f005_w011_cnc_machine.carry_square_fixture_to_cnc_opening: the worker carries a square metal fixture with an orange face and central hole in the right hand while walking to the open CNC machine
f005_w011_cnc_machine.position_square_fixture_inside_cnc: the worker presses the square metal fixture against the vertical mounting area inside the CNC machine and adjusts its position with the right hand
f005_w011_cnc_machine.press_illuminated_orange_control: the worker presses the illuminated orange round button on the CNC control panel with the left hand
f005_w011_cnc_machine.press_lower_right_silver_control: the worker presses the silver round button at the lower-right of the CNC control panel with the left hand
f005_w011_cnc_machine.close_cnc_sliding_door: the worker grips the black vertical handle of the CNC machine with the left hand and closes the sliding door
f005_w011_cnc_machine.move_orange_square_fixture_on_table: the worker lifts an orange square metal fixture from the worktable with the right hand, moves it to the adjacent position, and sets it down

f006_w005_compression_molding.carry_and_align_silver_mold_on_press_tab: the worker carries a two-level silver mold with both hands onto the press table, pushes it under the cylindrical upper press tool, aligns its position, and supports it with the left hand
f006_w005_compression_molding.operate_blue_lower_control_lever: the worker reaches toward the blue lever-shaped control below the control panel, grips it, and moves it
